title: Escalate enterprise high priority routing
description: Fix choose_support_channel so high-priority enterprise traffic routes to vip-escalation.

patch_hints.new:
if priority.lower().strip() in {"critical", "high"} and is_enterprise:
        return "vip-escalation"

repair_hints.new:
if normalized == "high":
        return "vip-escalation" if is_enterprise else "priority-queue"
